block.text: NO ADMITTANCE 182 When you leave the lift on the third floor, you immediately spy a man-sized Guard Robot standing in the hallway. 'Sorry. No admittance,' squawks its mechanical voice. What Will you do: Try to reason with the robot? Turn to 295 Attack the robot? Turn to 142 Go to another floor? Turn to 333

choice.text: Try to reason with the robot?
